title: Company Party 公司年会
scene: 公司年会上HR和员工聊天

lines.en: Great turnout tonight. Are you having a good time?
lines.zh: 今晚人真多。你玩得开心吗？

lines.en: Yes, the food is amazing and the music is great.
lines.zh: 开心，食物很棒，音乐也很赞。

lines.en: Did you see the CEO's speech?
I did. It was really inspiring.
We have some fun games later. Will you join?
lines.zh: 待会儿有一些有趣的游戏。你会参加吗？

lines.en: Definitely. I heard there are prizes too.
Yes, gift cards and extra vacation days.
lines.zh: 是的，礼品卡和额外假期。

lines.en: Wow, I am even more excited now.
Good luck then. Enjoy the rest of the night.
lines.zh: 那祝你好运。享受今晚剩下的时光吧。
